name: TreeCon Resources, Inc.
summary: TreeCon Resources, Inc., through its subsidiaries, distributes, leases, and finances industrial and logging equipment in the United States. It is also involved in sawmill operations; and producing water-based fluids for the oil and gas industry. The company was formerly known as Overhill Corporation. TreeCon Resources, Inc. was incorporated in 1963 and is based in Lufkin, Texas.
